Fit Manager

Fit library

Import a fit (EFT)

Paste an EFT block (in-game: right-click fitting → Copy to Clipboard, or from Pyfa). It is parsed and stat-checked locally, then committed to your repo.

Connection

Runs entirely on GitHub: this page reads/writes fits in your repo via a fine-grained token. Create one at github.com/settings/tokens with Contents: Read and write scoped to your fits repo. It is stored only in this browser (localStorage).

EVE Online SSO

Used for per-character skills (feeds Pyfa-accurate stats), reading in-game fittings, and sending fits to your personal in-game fittings. Register/extend an app at developers.eveonline.com with scopes esi-skills.read_skills.v1 · esi-fittings.read_fittings.v1 · esi-fittings.write_fittings.v1 · publicData and add this exact callback URL:

The nightly self-improve Action commits analysis into suggestions/; this page shows those under each fit. Add an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY repo secret to enable the LLM coach.

UI Scale

Resize the entire interface. Changes apply instantly and are saved on this device.

%
